Where It All Begins

From Farm to Station

Every cup starts in the highlands of Guji Zone — 1,950–2,150 MASL — where ripe cherries are hand-picked and processed at our own washing station.

Guji Zone, Ethiopia
🌿 Farm & Harvest
Freshly Picked Cherries — Guji Zone
